introSection: Gold Rush is a steel roller coaster located at OK Corral in Cuges-les-Pins, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer and opened on 7 July 2012.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 10 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders.

fullText:
Gold Rush is a steel roller coaster located at OK Corral in Cuges-les-Pins, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer and opened on 7 July 2012.



Single train with 10 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders.
